title: Suspensions and Permanent Exclusions by Ethnicity
description: National England rows from the DfE exclusions characteristic dataset, including ethnicity, education phase, FSM eligibility, counts, and published rates.

metadata.name: Suspensions and permanent exclusions in England (Autumn term 2024/25)
metadata.publisher: Department for Education via Explore Education Statistics
metadata.methodology: Fetched from the Explore Education Statistics data catalogue CSV for the current suspensions publication. This implementation keeps national England rows for tracked Black and mixed White/Black ethnic groups plus the all-pupils total, then derives all_black and all_black_including_mixed aggregates from the published counts. Published rate fields in this CSV are percentages of pupils in each group, not per-10,000 rates.
caveats: Current education implementation uses the national characteristic extract, not the full region/local-authority file.
Suspension, permanent exclusion, and one-plus-suspension rates are percentages of pupils in the group.
The Mixed White and Black Caribbean group is kept separate because it has distinct outcomes in DfE education statistics.
